zh.lifeSummary: William Denebaud是Philip Denebaud, alias de Anebou和Alice Giffard的兒子，於1215年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治。他和Alice or Agnes Hereward至少有1個兒子。他去世於1242年之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Denebaud was born in 1215, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the son of Philip Denebaud, alias de Anebou and Alice Giffard. He had at least 1 son with Alice or Agnes Hereward. He died before 1242, in his hometown.

ko.lifeSummary: William Denebaud(은)는 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 Philip Denebaud, alias de Anebou(와)과 Alice Giffard의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Alice or Agnes Hereward(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1242년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William Denebaud родился в 1215 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Philip Denebaud, alias de Anebou и Alice Giffard. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice or Agnes Hereward. Он умер перед 1242 г. в его родном городе.
